message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Search for Products by ID (using DB dao)

actor User
participant "<<main>>\nAdministration" as Admin
participant "<<frame>>\nMainMenu" as MainMenu
participant "<<dialog>>\nProductReportDialog" as PRD
participant "<<ProductDAO>>\nProductDatabaseDAO" as PDAO
participant "SimpleListModel\n:model" as SLM
database Database

User -> Admin : <<construct>>
Admin -> MainMenu : <<construct>>

User -> Admin : clicks 'View Products'
Admin -> PRD : <<construct>>
PRD -> PDAO : <<construct>>
PRD -> PDAO : getProducts()
PDAO -> Database : select * from product
Database -->> PDAO : ResultSet
PDAO -> PDAO : reconstruct products\nfrom ResultSet
PDAO -->> PRD : products
PRD -> SLM : <<construct>>
PRD -> SLM : updateItems(products)
note left of PRD : products now\nvisible to user
PRD -> PRD : lstProducts.setModel(model)

User -> PRD : enters product id into search bar
PRD -> PRD : txtId.getText : id

User -> PRD : clicks "Search"
PRD -> PDAO : search(id)
PDAO -> Database : select * from product where product_id = id
Database -->> PDAO : product
PRD -> SLM : updateItems(product)
note left of PRD : only searched product\nnow visible to user
PRD -> PRD : lstProducts.getModel(model)

@enduml
```
